data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of booking completion within the Google interface, but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While there are multiple successful booking steps, none of them explicitly demonstrate that the booking process was completed within the Google interface itself. The linked use case describes the process but lacks concrete evidence of the booking being finalized within Google, indicating a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the booking was completed within the Google interface.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of booking completion within Google interface
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API reads or state checks that confirm the booking was completed within the Google interface.
